description:
Markdown-based note-taking app for developers


🚀 Release Notes
This release improves navigation, content referencing, and overall reliability, making Znote smoother and more powerful for building notes as tools.
✨ Features
- Improved menu UI for a cleaner, more consistent experience
- Right-click on folders to create or delete folders
- Enhanced Treeview behavior (better expand/collapse handling)
- Reference blocks by name inside Quotes
- Reference .txt and .md files in Quotes and AI inputs
🐛 Fixes
- Reveal in Treeview now works for notes in Trash
- Emptying Trash automatically closes deleted notes
- Fixed Ctrl+Y to properly open the note explorer in the editor
- Fixed multi-line paste inside Quotes
- Improved reliability of AI web search retries
